seoTitle: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Horsfield Bay and Horsley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horsfield Bay and Horsley.
heading: Horsfield Bay vs Horsley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horsfield Bay, New South Wales and Horsley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Horsley has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Horsfield Bay (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Horsfield Bay or Horsley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horsfield Bay has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Horsley scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horsfield Bay scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Horsley scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horsfield Bay or Horsley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Horsley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
